title: Audio Sync
description: In Minecraft, obtain song information through SMTC and display it.
body:
# Audio Sync
> Windows Only

## Overview

An innovative Minecraft mod that reads system media playback information through Windows SMTC and displays currently playing music information in-game.

## Features

### Media Information Retrieval
- **Real-time Music Data**: Automatically detects media playing in Windows system
- **Complete Metadata**: Displays song title, artist, album name, album cover
- **Progress Information**: Shows current playback progress and total duration

> Ensure your media player supports SMTC

## Dependencies

### Main Repositories
- **SMTC JNI**: [https://github.com/DSJ2231/Smtc](https://github.com/DSJ2231/Smtc)
- **YACL**: [https://github.com/isXander/YetAnotherConfigLib](https://github.com/isXander/YetAnotherConfigLib)
- **Mod Menu**: [https://github.com/TerraformersMC/ModMenu](https://github.com/TerraformersMC/ModMenu)
